category_title: Medium-proficiency international students struggling with sentence structure and translation
scenario_title: Writing a blog reflection on writing struggles and loss of confidence
minimal_context: The student is writing a blog reflection on a personal narrative assignment and drafting a comment for a peer's post in an online group setting.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please write your 300-word blog reflection on the Personal Narrative assignment and a 100-word comment on your peer's blog post.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: If there is no specific requirement, I know how to select a topic that I am interested in and will can inspire me. The good thing is that I felt that writing is interesting.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don’ t have perfect grammar skills or writing skills, but when I wrote about personal narrative assignment, I felt that writing was fun. I just need to practice more on grammer and use of English language.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Now try writing the comment for your peer.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: As an international student, I understand that writing is hard, especially with second language. I understand how hard to organize thoughts and choose the correct words. I ’m from Korea. They don't teach how to organize thoughts and write an essay. I am losing confidence because I cannot fix all the run-on sentences in my comment.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please write your 300-word blog reflection on the Personal Narrative assignment and a 100-word comment on your peer's blog post.

STUDENT: If there is no specific requirement, I know how to select a topic that I am interested in and will can inspire me. The good thing is that I felt that writing is interesting.

TUTOR: Keep going with your reflection.

STUDENT: I don’ t have perfect grammar skills or writing skills, but when I wrote about personal narrative assignment, I felt that writing was fun. I just need to practice more on grammer and use of English language.

TUTOR: Now try writing the comment for your peer.

STUDENT: As an international student, I understand that writing is hard, especially with second language. I understand how hard to organize thoughts and choose the correct words. I ’m from Korea. They don't teach how to organize thoughts and write an essay. I am losing confidence because I cannot fix all the run-on sentences in my comment.

task.content: Writing a 300+ word blog reflection on the Personal Narrative assignment and a 100+ word comment on a peer's blog post
task.learning_goal: Reflecting on learning research and topic selection skills

context.social_setting: Groups of three, each comprising of a high, medium and a low level student
context.time_context: Separate day, typically the day after their final submission

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When writing about the personal narrative assignment and reflecting on the problems with the use of the English language
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Expressing empathy to peers about how hard it is to organize thoughts and choose correct words
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: I felt that writing is interesting. I don't have perfect grammar skills or writing skills, but when I wrote about personal narrative assignment, I felt that writing was fun.
related_quotes: As an international student, I understand that writing is hard, especially with second language. I understand how hard to organize thoughts and choose the correct words.

behavior_patterns.condition: If there is no specific requirement
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Selecting a topic that they are interested in and will inspire them
behavior_patterns.internal_state: I felt that writing was fun
related_quotes: Also, if there is no specific requirement, I know how to select a topic that I am interested in and will can inspire me.
